name: ess-maker-profile
description: Chat-only, big-button experience for customizing your Employee Self-Service agent. POC.

commands.title: ESS Maker: Push to Copilot Studio

walkthroughs.title: Welcome to the ESS Maker Kit
walkthroughs.description: Build, update, and publish your Employee Self-Service agent with plain English. No code required.

steps.title: How the kit works
steps.description:
You describe what you want in plain English. GitHub Copilot does the rest — generating topics, adaptive cards, and integration wiring.

Use the Quick Actions buttons on the left to work through each step.

[Close this tutorial](command:workbench.action.closeActiveEditor)

steps.title: Connect
steps.description: Signs you in to your Power Platform environment so the kit can discover your deployed ESS agent and create a local working copy.

steps.title: Create a topic
steps.description: Generates a new conversation topic from a plain-English description — trigger phrases, conversation flow, adaptive cards, and integration wiring.

steps.title: Scan for issues
steps.description: Checks your agent for broken references, missing bindings, malformed configuration, and dependency conflicts before you ship.

steps.title: Validate readiness
steps.description: Runs 41+ automated checks across licensing, environment, integrations, and publishing readiness. Produces an HTML report you can share with stakeholders.

steps.title: Push to Copilot Studio
steps.description: Safely deploys your changes: checkpoint → dry-run diff → push → verify. You can always roll back if something goes wrong.
